analogy: Think of RepoTour like a documentary film crew visiting a factory. The scripts/ folder is the camera crew that observes and records everything. The agents/ folder is the editing suite that compresses hours of footage into highlights. The references/ folder is the script that guides the story. The templates/ folder is the final cut that gets published.

layers.name: Analysis Layer
layers.responsibility: Python scripts scan repo structure, detect stack, find entry points, map imports

layers.name: Agent Layer
layers.responsibility: Haiku subagents read files and produce compressed briefings for Sonnet

layers.name: Content Layer
layers.responsibility: Sonnet reads briefings and writes section JSON using prompts from references/

layers.name: Assembly Layer
layers.responsibility: generate_site.py reads all content JSON and produces the final index.html

mermaid:
graph TD
  Repo[Target Repo] --> Scripts[Analysis Scripts]
  Scripts --> Analysis[repo-analysis.json]
  Analysis --> Haiku[Haiku Agents]
  Haiku --> Briefings[File Briefings]
  Briefings --> Sonnet[Sonnet Orchestrator]
  Sonnet --> Content[site-content JSON]
  Content --> Generator[generate_site.py]
  Generator --> Site[index.html]
